mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM account WHERE account_id IN
#{id}

SELECT a.account_id, a.username, a.nickname, a.avatar_url FROM account a LEFT JOIN user_relation following ON following.from_account_id = #{currentUserId} AND following.to_account_id = a.account_id AND following.relation_type = 'FOLLOW' AND following.status = 'ACTIVE' LEFT JOIN user_relation follower ON follower.from_account_id = a.account_id AND follower.to_account_id = #{currentUserId} AND follower.relation_type = 'FOLLOW' AND follower.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE a.account_id != #{currentUserId} AND a.status != 3 AND (a.is_deleted = 0 OR a.is_deleted IS NULL) AND a.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') AND NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM user_relation blocked WHERE blocked.relation_type = 'BLOCK' AND blocked.status = 'ACTIVE' AND ( (blocked.from_account_id = #{currentUserId} AND blocked.to_account_id = a.account_id) OR (blocked.from_account_id = a.account_id AND blocked.to_account_id = #{currentUserId}) ) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN following.relation_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0 WHEN follower.relation_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, CASE WHEN a.username LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.username ASC LIMIT 5
mapper.sql: WHERE a.status != 3 AND (a.is_deleted = 0 OR a.is_deleted IS NULL) AND ( a.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR (#{keyword} REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND a.account_id = CAST(#{keyword} AS UNSIGNED)) )
mapper.select:
SELECT a.account_id, a.username, a.nickname, a.avatar_url FROM account a
ORDER BY CASE WHEN #{keyword} REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' AND a.account_id = CAST(#{keyword} AS UNSIGNED) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN a.username LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN a.nickname LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, a.username ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
